title: The meaning and purpose of budgets
summary: 9609 AS — types of budgets and their role in planning and control.
learningObjectives: Evaluate benefits and drawbacks of budgets.

simpleExplanation.title: Financial plans for departments
simpleExplanation.summary: Budgets set expected income and spending over a period, helping coordination, control, and motivation.

sections.content: **Budgets** (5.5.1) pair with **5.5.2 variances**. List **purpose + budget type** for case departments.
